session.admin_required_override: Admin access required for this override

override.assistant_kill_switch: Kill switch requires explicit confirmation in your question (e.g. include "confirm").

config.timezone: site.timezone must be 'auto' or a valid IANA timezone name
config.priority_order: engine.priority_order must list each of resilience, savings, self_sufficiency exactly once
config.tier_hysteresis: load_shedding tier '{name}': restore_above_soc ({restore}) must be > shed_below_soc ({shed})

update.docker_cli_missing: Docker CLI is not available in this container. Pull ghcr.io/oraad/solar-ai-optimizer:latest (v{min_version}+) and recreate the container once manually; see docs/installation.md.
update.self_update_disabled: Self-update is not enabled for this deployment.
update.version_below_minimum: Version {version} is below minimum {min_version} for self-update.
update.restore_disabled: Backup restore is not enabled for this deployment.
update.restore_image_unknown: Could not determine image for restore.
update.downgrade_warning: Installing an older release will restart the service. A backup of /app/data is created automatically before every install. Downgrading may be incompatible if config or database schema changed since that version.

instructions.addon: Update via the Home Assistant Supervisor: Settings → Add-ons → Solar AI Optimizer → Update.
instructions.compose:
From the project directory:
  docker compose pull
  docker compose up -d --build

Or enable self-update with docker-compose.self-update.yml (see docs/installation.md).
instructions.compose_versioned:
From the project directory:
  docker pull {image}
  docker compose up -d --build

Or set SELF_UPDATE_IMAGE={image} and enable self-update (see docs/installation.md).
instructions.proxmox:
On Proxmox LXC, run: update

Or manually:
  docker pull ghcr.io/oraad/solar-ai-optimizer:latest
  docker stop solar-optimizer && docker rm solar-optimizer
  docker run -d --name solar-optimizer --restart unless-stopped \
    --env-file /opt/solar-ai-optimizer/solar.env \
    -v solar-data:/app/data -p 8000:8000 \
    ghcr.io/oraad/solar-ai-optimizer:latest
instructions.proxmox_versioned:
On Proxmox LXC, run: update

Or manually:
  docker pull {image}
  docker stop solar-optimizer && docker rm solar-optimizer
  docker run -d --name solar-optimizer --restart unless-stopped \
    --env-file /opt/solar-ai-optimizer/solar.env \
    -v solar-data:/app/data -p 8000:8000 \
    {image}

reserve.main: Reserve target {target}% (driver: {driver}). Autonomy floor {autonomy}% ({hours}h @ {load}W); solar-bridge {bridge}% (bridge {bridge_kwh} kWh incl. {buffer}% buffer).{extra_cold}{extra_heat}{extra_degraded}
reserve.cold_snap: Cold snap: {hdh} heating degree-hrs (24h) raising expected load.
reserve.heat_wave: Heat wave: {cdh} cooling degree-hrs (24h) raising expected load.
reserve.degraded_buffer: Degraded/stale forecast — extra conservative buffer applied.

summary.with_priorities_present: {prefix}Priorities: {order}. SOC {soc} vs reserve {target}% | grid PRESENT | blackout risk: {risk}.{advisory_suffix}{extra}
summary.with_priorities_absent: {prefix}Priorities: {order}. SOC {soc} vs reserve {target}% | grid absent | blackout risk: {risk}.{advisory_suffix}{extra}

advisory.surplus: Surplus available ({kw} kW) with battery full: divert to deferrable loads (geyser/EV/pumps) instead of curtailing.

override.force_grid_charge_plan: Operator override: force grid charge at max safe current.
override.grid_charge_zero: Operator override: grid charge current set to 0.

grid.reserve_met: Reserve target {target}% met (SOC {soc}%); stop grid charge.
grid.legacy_top_up: Grid present and SOC {soc}% < reserve target {target}%: opportunistic top-up at max.
grid.charge_hard: Charge hard while grid available ({amps} A).
grid.ramp_to: Grid present, SOC {soc}% < target {target}%: ramp to {amps} A.

shed.restore_grid: Grid present: restore tier (battery not at risk).
shed.conservative: SOC unknown or telemetry stale: shed '{tier}' conservatively.
shed.emergency_restore: Restore tier after emergency / kill switch.

battery.charging: already charging {amps} A from PV ({watts} W)

degraded.solcast_misconfigured: solcast selected but SOLCAST_API_KEY or SOLCAST_RESOURCE_ID not set
degraded.location_missing: latitude/longitude not configured (still 0,0); solar forecast unreliable

discovery.no_device_id: Entity has no device_id; configure state_entities manually.

system.base: You are the assistant for a home solar/battery optimizer running on Home Assistant.
system.answer: Answer concisely and concretely using the provided live context. If asked to explain a decision, reference the reserve target, SOC, solar forecast, and grid state.

priorities.footer: . The grid is unpredictable and is treated as a reactive, opportunistic resource only (never predicted).

heuristic.soc_vs_reserve: Battery is at {soc}% versus a reserve target of {reserve}%.
heuristic.no_context: No decision context is available yet.
